---
title: "Rāg Megh"
subtitle: "*Prabala dala megha*"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

::: {.composer-info}
**Composer:** Tānasen &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Tāl:** Jhāpatāl (Madhyalay)
:::

## Lyrics {.unnumbered}

::: {.lyrics-block}

**Sthāyī**

> prabala dala megha jhuka jhuma yā bhūma para<br>umaḍa ghanaghora jhaḍi indra lāyo

**Antarā**

> barakhata musaladhāra hota pahara cāra<br>kṛṣṇa giridhara gokula ko bacāyo

**Sañcārī**

> bundana dharaṇī dhara sabahi kī rakṣa kara<br>paśū pañchī jala thala ati sukha pāyo 

**Ābhog**

> tānasena ke prabhu terī gati adabhūta<br>surapati adhīna hoya śīṣa navāyo

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" collapse="true"}
## Reading the notation

Jhāpatāl is a 10-beat cycle divided as **2 + 3 + 2 + 3** (vibhāgs marked **X**, **2**, **O**, **3**). Each row below shows **one complete cycle**: the ten columns correspond to beats 1–10, with sam **X** at beat 1, tali **2** at beat 3, khālī **O** at beat 6, and tali **3** at beat 8.

The sargam row gives the notes; the bold text row below it gives the lyrics syllables. A dash **-** indicates a held note or empty beat. Brackets $\lb{\cdot}$ denote meend (glide) or grouped notes; superscripts $\sps{\cdot}$ indicate the starting grace note of a glide; $\tr{X}$ denotes a note in the upper octave (tār saptak); $\mn{X}$ denotes a note in the lower octave (mandra saptak). Note: The Bishnupuri interpretation is characterized by the use of śuddha gāndhār and śuddha nishād, in contrast to the more commonly employed komal (flat) variants.
:::

## Sthāyī {.unnumbered .jhapatal}

::: {.notation-table}

| **X** |   | **2** |   |   | **O** |   | **3** |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| N | N | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | P | P | m | P |
| **pra** | **ba** | **la** | **da** | **la** | **me** | **-** | **gha** | **jhu** | **ka** |
| $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{P}}\mathrm{N}}$ | - | P | m | P | $\lb{\mathrm{mG}}$ | m | R | R | S |
| **jhu** | **-** | **ma** | **yā** | **-** | **bhū** | **-** | **ma** | **pa** | **ra** |
| S | R | R | m | P | N | P | P | m | P |
| **u** | **ma** | **ḍa** | **gha** | **na** | **gho** | **-** | **ra** | **jha** | **ḍi** |
| $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{P}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | - | N | P | P | m | P | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{P}}\mathrm{N}}$ | m | P |
| **i** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ndra** | **lā** | **-** | **yo** | **-** | **-** |

:::

## Antarā {.unnumbered .jhapatal}

::: {.notation-table}

| **X** |   | **2** |   |   | **O** |   | **3** |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| m | P | N | N | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **ba** | **ra** | **kha** | **ta** | **mu** | **sa** | **la** | **dhā** | **-** | **ra** |
| $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{m}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | P | P |
| **ho** | **-** | **ta** | **-** | **pa** | **ha** | **ra** | **cā** | **-** | **ra** |
| m | P | N | N | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **ba** | **ra** | **kha** | **ta** | **mu** | **sa** | **la** | **dhā** | **-** | **ra** |
| $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{m}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | P | P |
| **ho** | **-** | **ta** | **-** | **pa** | **ha** | **ra** | **cā** | **-** | **ra** |
| $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{P}}\tr{\mathrm{m}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{m}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{m}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | m | P |
| **kṛ** | **-** | **ṣṇa** | **gi** | **ri** | **dha** | **ra** | **-** | **go** | **-** |
| N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | P | P | m | P | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{P}}\mathrm{N}}$ | m | P |
| **ku** | **la** | **ko** | **-** | **ba** | **cā** | **-** | **yo** | **-** | **-** |

:::

## Sañcārī {.unnumbered .jhapatal}

::: {.notation-table}

| **X** |   | **2** |   |   | **O** |   | **3** |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| $\lb{\mathrm{mG}}$ | m | R | m | P | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{P}}\mathrm{N}}$ | P | N | P | - |
| **bun** | **da** | **na** | **dha** | **ra** | **ṇī** | **-** | **dha** | **ra** | **-** |
| N | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | P | N | P | P |
| **sa** | **ba** | **hi** | **-** | **kī** | **ra** | **-** | **kṣa** | **ka** | **ra** |
| $\lb{\mathrm{mG}}$ | m | R | m | P | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{P}}\mathrm{N}}$ | P | N | P | - |
| **bun** | **da** | **na** | **dha** | **ra** | **ṇī** | **-** | **dha** | **ra** | **-** |
| N | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | P | N | P | P |
| **sa** | **va** | **hi** | **-** | **kī** | **ra** | **-** | **cchā** | **ka** | **ra** |
| m | G | R | $\lb{\mathrm{Pm}}$ | P | m | G | m | R | S |
| **pa** | **śū** | **pa** | **-** | **ñchī** | **ja** | **la** | **-** | **tha** | **la** |
| S | R | m | P | - | $\lb{\mathrm{PN}}$ | m | P | - | - |
| **a** | **ti** | **su** | **kha** | **-** | **pā** | **-** | **yo** | **-** | **-** |

:::

## Ābhog {.unnumbered .jhapatal}

::: {.notation-table}

| **X** |   | **2** |   |   | **O** |   | **3** |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| m | P | P | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - |
| **tā** | **-** | **na** | **se** | **-** | **na** | **ke** | **pra** | **bhu** | **-** |
| N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\lb{\sps{\tr{\mathrm{R}}}\tr{\mathrm{m}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | P |
| **te** | **-** | **rī** | **ga** | **ti** | **a** | **da** | **bhū** | **ta** | **-** |
| m | P | P | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - |
| **tā** | **-** | **na** | **se** | **-** | **na** | **ke** | **pra** | **bhu** | **-** |
| N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\lb{\sps{\tr{\mathrm{R}}}\tr{\mathrm{m}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | P |
| **te** | **-** | **rī** | **ga** | **ti** | **a** | **da** | **bhū** | **ta** | **-** |
| $\tr{\mathrm{m}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{m}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | P | P |
| **su** | **ra** | **pa** | **ti** | **a** | **dhī** | **na** | **ho** | **-** | **ya** |
| $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{P}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | - | N | P | P | m | P | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{P}}\mathrm{N}}$ | m | P |
| **śī** | **-** | **ṣa** | **-** | **na** | **vā** | **-** | **yo** | **-** | **-** |

:::
